title: selaginella cuspidata
intro: Selaginella cuspidata, a species of the Selaginella genus, is a type of spore-bearing vascular plant, commonly known as a resurrection fern due to its ability to revive itself from a dry state. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella cuspidata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
